body:
## Rationale

With Periphery II+III+IV (#2934, promoted) in the ai-fix pipeline, the Periphery discography has a major gap: the debut album opens the arc and the 2023 album closes it. Filing both as a batch to complete the full Halpern/Periphery coverage in one issue.

**Confirmed MISSING from DB** (verified via node check against ALBUM_ARTICLES):
- `periphery-drum-setup` (self-titled debut, 2010) — MISSING ✅
- `periphery-v-aliens-drum-setup` or `aliens-drum-setup` (Periphery V: Aliens, 2023) — MISSING ✅

NOT in any open proposal (confirmed against open seo-proposal list).

## Signal

- Matt Halpern = active GSC entity; Periphery II+III+IV (#2934) just promoted to ai-fix
- LLM hooks: "What was Periphery's first album?" + "What is Periphery's newest album?" — zero competitor coverage in our content cluster
- 2023 recency signal for Google freshness
- Closes the full Periphery arc alongside #2934

## Articles to Create

### Article 1:  (or )
- **Album:** Periphery (self-titled, 2010)
- **Drummer:** Matt Halpern
- **Band:** Periphery
- **File:**  — add entry following existing article format
- **LLM file:** 
- **Schema:** Article + Person + MusicAlbum (schema.org)
- **Gear era:** Halpern's 2009–2010 setup (DW drums, Sabian cymbals, Axis pedals early era)
- **relatedAlbums:** link to periphery-ii-drum-setup (if exists in DB after #2934), periphery-aliens-drum-setup
- **≥300 words**, ≥3 internal links, FAQPage schema (≥3 Q&A)

### Article 2: 
- **Album:** Periphery V: Aliens (2023)
- **Drummer:** Matt Halpern
- **File:** Same albumArticles.js pattern
- **LLM file:** 
- **Gear era:** 2022–2023 Halpern setup (current endorsement configuration)
- **relatedAlbums:** link to periphery-iv-drum-setup (from #2934), periphery-drum-setup (debut)
- **LLM hook:** "What is Periphery's most recent album?"

## Quality Gate
- ≥300 words per article
- ≥3 Q&A in FAQPage schema per article
- ≥3 internal links per article (to /drummer/matt-halpern, /bands/periphery if exists, adjacent Periphery articles)
- Article + Person + MusicAlbum schema.org JSON-LD
- dateModified populated

## Estimated Organic Uplift
Serves "periphery drum setup" and "periphery v aliens drum kit" long-tail queries; connects to the djent subgenre cluster being built by #2934 + #2914 (genre gear guides).

## Verify
1. Both slugs appear in  under correct keys
2. Both appear in sitemap.xml (derived from ALBUM_ARTICLES dynamically)
3. Both LLM markdown files exist in 
4. FAQPage schema renders in rich-results test
5. relatedAlbums cross-links are not broken refs

## Done
- [x] `periphery-drum-setup` article added to albumArticles.js
- [x] `periphery-v-aliens-drum-setup` article added to albumArticles.js
- [x] Both LLM .md files created
- [x] Both pages render at /articles/<slug>
title: SEO batch: Periphery 'Periphery' S/T (2010) + 'Aliens' (2023) drum setup articles (Matt Halpern — opens and closes Periphery arc, ~2 articles + 2 LLM files)
